items.name: Banana
items.description: Place a banana on your current space. Any car entering this space must pay 1 Heat or take a Spin Out.

items.name: Red Shell
items.description: Target the car immediately in front of you. They must move down 1 Gear and take 1 Stress card.

items.name: Mushroom
items.description: Perform an extra Boost this turn without paying Heat. You may also ignore 1 symbol on a corner.

items.name: Star
items.description: Become Invincible! Move +2 spaces, ignore all track limits, and you cannot be affected by other items this turn.

items.name: Blue Shell
items.description: The current race leader must immediately move to 1st Gear and discard 2 cards from their hand.

items.name: Rocket
items.description: Blast forward! Move +5 spaces instantly. Any cars you pass must take 1 Stress card.

items.name: Yellow Coin
items.description: Collect 1 coin. You may discard this at any time to move +1 space.

items.name: Red Coin
items.description: Collect a red coin. If you have 3, you may discard them to Remove 2 Heat from your engine.

items.name: Green Shell
items.description: Fire forward! The next car in front of you (any distance) must take 1 Stress card.

items.name: Fire Flower
items.description: You may fire up to 3 fireballs. Each target must pay 1 Heat or move down 1 Gear.

items.name: Ice Flower
items.description: Freeze the track! All cars you pass this turn must move down 1 Gear.

items.name: Lightning
items.description: Shock everyone! All other players must move down 1 Gear and discard 1 card.

items.name: Blooper
items.description: Ink the leader! The race leader must play with their hand face-up until the end of their next turn.

items.name: Golden Mushroom
items.description: Triple Boost! Perform 3 extra Boosts this turn without paying Heat.
